en: It's kind of blurry. That's better.
Question. What kind of bear is best? That's a ridiculous question. False. Black bear.
ko: 질문. 어떤 곰이 가장 좋아? 그건 말도 안 되는 질문이야. 틀렸어. 흑곰이지.

en: Well, that's debatable. There are basically two schools of thought. Fact. Bears eat beets. Bears. Beets. Battlestar Galactica.
ko: 음, 그건 논쟁의 여지가 있어. 기본적으로 두 가지 학파가 있지. 사실. 곰은 비트를 먹어. 곰. 비트. 배틀스타 갤럭티카.

en: Bears do not... What is going on? What are you doing? Last week I was in a drugstore and I saw these glasses.
ko: 곰은 안... 무슨 일이야? 뭐 하는 거야? 지난주에 약국에 갔는데 이 안경을 봤어.

en: Four dollars, and it only cost me seven dollars to recreate the rest of the ensemble. And that's a grand total of eleven dollars.
ko: 4달러였고, 나머지 복장을 재현하는 데 7달러밖에 안 들었어. 총합은 11달러야.

en: Of course, you know what? Imitation is the sincerest form of flattery.
ko: 물론, 있잖아? 모방은 가장 진실한 형태의 찬사야.
